name: NINPOU: CHAKRA NAGASHI (NINJA ART: CHAKRA FLOW)

description.value:
You imbue a single held melee weapon or five thrown or projectile ammunitions with Chakra, having them count as Chakra enhanced for the purpose of bypassing damage reductions and having them deal 1d6 additional force damage to any creature or object made entirely of Chakra. The effect ends one round after such an imbued weapon is no longer held by you.

Mastery: The first step allows weapons to remain imbued as long as they are within 5 ft of you.

The third step allows you to replace the Material Focus with any object or weapon.

The fifth step requires ECL 12 to learn, but allows you to imbue the weapon with an effect based on your primary elemental affinity (see below). Doing so increases the Chakra cost of the technique to 6 and adds the appropriate descriptor to the technique:

Earth (Crushing) - The weapon has hardness 20, bypasses dark iron damage reduction and ignores any hardness of 8 or lower, and gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls made against targets affected by the Suibouheki no Jutsu technique, or those vulnerable to earth damage. Imbued objects do not gain the increased hardness.

Fire (Searing) - Creatures or objects struck by the weapon have their hardness and damage reductions reduced by 2 for 3 rounds, stacking up to 10 times. Lasts for 5 attacks. Any creature suffering more than 25% of its HP in damage from a searing weapon takes a 50% penalty to any healing received by Medical techniques, healing spells or Treat Injury skill use for 24 hours. Lastly, the weapon gains a +2 bonus to attack against a creature vulnerable to fire, or one affected by the Junkaze no Jutsu technique.

Ice (Freezing) - Creatures or objects struck by the weapon have their hardness and damage reductions reduced by 1 for 5 rounds, stacking up to 10 times. The weapon gains a +2 bonus to attack against a creature vulnerable to cold, or one affected by the Soukou no Jutsu technique.

Lightning (Vibrating) - The weapon ignores all hardness and 5 points of damage reductions. The weapon gains a +2 bonus to attack against a creature vulnerable to lightning, or a +4 bonus against a creature affected by the Tsuchi no Yoroi technique (choose one).

Water (Slowing) - Creatures hit by the weapon take a -1 penalty to Defense for 2 rounds, stacking up to 5 times. Lasts for 5 attacks. The weapon gains a +2 bonus to attack against a creature vulnerable to water, or one affected by the Enkoudate no Jutsu technique.

Wind (Slicing) - The weapon ignores 15 points of hardness and/or damage reductions, and automatically confirms critical hits. Lasts for 4 hits. The weapon gains a +2 bonus to attack against a creature vulnerable to wind, or one affected by the Raidate no Jutsu technique.
